title: Horse Lords Announce New Album Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive!: Hear Two Tracks
author: Abby Jones

The post Horse Lords Announce New Album <em>Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive!</em>: Hear Two Tracks appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Horse Lords are back. The long-running experimental rock band of guitarist Owen Gardner, bassist Max Eilbacher, drummer Sam Haberman, and saxophonist/percussionist Andrew Bernstein will return this June with Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive!, and as a preview, today they're sharing its first two songs "Eureka 378-B" and "Brain Of The Firm."

To help flesh out the bold sound of Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive!, Horse Lords enlisted bass clarinetist Madison Greenstone and trombonist Weston Olencki. The band also recruited their first-ever vocalists in Nina Guo and Evelyn Saylor, who bring an eerie introduction to the polyphonic, mathy one-two punch of "Eureka 378-B" and "Brain Of The Firm." Check out the double single below, along with the full album tracklist.

TRACKLIST:
01 "Eureka 378-B"
02 "Brain Of The Firm"
03 "Rotation I"
04 "Playing And Reality"
05 "Rotation II"
06 "First Galactic Utopia"
07 "Rotation III"
08 "Before The Law"
09 "After The Last Sky"
10 "A City Yet To Come"
11 "Second Galactic Utopia"
12 "Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive!"

Demand To Be Taken To Heaven Alive! is out 6/12 via RVNG Intl.
